description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The body is predominantly black, with a rounded nose and a visible spinning propeller at the front. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage, featuring a small, enclosed canopy with yellow-tinted windows. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The landing gear appears to be fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller tail wheel. The overall design suggests a lightweight, general aviation or vintage-style aircraft suitable for short flights.
description: A small, black, single-propeller airplane with a low-wing design, enclosed cockpit, and fixed landing gear. Features a classic tail and yellow-tinted windows.
description_view_0: Front-bottom view showing the spinning propeller, yellow-tinted cockpit windows, and both main landing gear legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, propeller disc, and the fixed main landing gear under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear-bottom view displaying the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the underside of the wings.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the full wingspan, cockpit placement, and the overall planform of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a small canopy and yellow-tinted windows.
